ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency used for portfolio valuation */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector classification of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "txn_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_code" TEXT /* Reference to the portfolio in which the transaction occurred */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Reference to the financial instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "txn_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "txn_trade_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was executed */,
  "txn_settle_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was settled */,
  "txn_units" INTEGER /* Number of units traded */,
  "txn_price" REAL /* Price per unit */,
  "txn_consideration" REAL /* Total consideration of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction was executed */,
  "cash_transactions" TEXT /* Description of cash transactions related to the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker who executed the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_code FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_code") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, trader, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "txn_id" TEXT /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_txn_id FOREIGN KEY ("txn_id") REFERENCES transactions ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "broker_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
